command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'

echo '=== TRACKED FILE COUNT ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && git ls-files | wc -l" 2>&1

echo '=== ESTIMATED PROMPT SIZE ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && git ls-files | wc -c" 2>&1

echo '=== CHECK prompt file if present ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "ls -la /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/logs/*.prompt.txt 2>/dev/null | head -5" 2>&1

echo '=== OLLAMA PS - what is running now ==='
curl -s http://192.168.0.39:11434/api/ps | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
for m in d.get('models',[]):
    print('3090 running:', m.get('name'), 'expires:', m.get('expires_at','?'))
if not d.get('models'):
    print('3090: IDLE')
" 2>/dev/null

echo DONE_1950
